count = 0

    i += 1

title: Decrementing While Loop
description: Predict the output of this loop that counts down from 5.

prompt.code:
i = 5
while i > 2:
    print(i)
    i -= 1

evaluation.solutionCode:
i = 5
while i > 2:
    print(i)
    i -= 1

title: Variable Shadowed in Inner Loop
description: Predict the output when an outer loop variable is reused as an inner loop variable.

prompt.code:
total = 0
for i in range(3):
    i = i * 2
    total += i
print(total)

evaluation.solutionCode:
total = 0
for i in range(3):
    i = i * 2
    total += i
print(total)

title: Toggling Flag in Loop

prompt.code:

print(flag)
